data.title: TEST: Dynamic Content Carousel
data.content:
<!-- wp:takt/demo-container {"title":"Default / Minimal (Blog)","description":"Only heading populated, automatic blog posts. Tests minimal configuration with default carousel controls."} -->
<!-- wp:takt/dynamic-content-carousel {"heading":"Blog","postsType":"post","postsSource":"automatic"} /-->
<!-- /wp:takt/demo-container -->

<!-- wp:takt/demo-container {"title":"Full Content (Blog)","description":"All fields populated: eyebrow, heading, description, and CTA button. Tests complete two-column ThemeHeading rendering."} -->
<!-- wp:takt/dynamic-content-carousel {"eyebrow":"Work Integrated Learning Initiative","heading":"Other Initiatives","description":"Diam sed vestibulum et aliquam dignissim velit nulla. Orci ac aliquam justo amet sed. Porttitor nibh in lectus lectus enim nulla phasellus tellus commodo.","buttons":[{"title":"Tell Us What You'd Like to See","url":"#"}],"postsType":"post","postsSource":"automatic","postsLimit":9} /-->
<!-- /wp:takt/demo-container -->

<!-- wp:takt/demo-container {"title":"Automatic with Fallback Enabled","description":"Automatic mode with fallbackToLatest enabled (default). If taxonomy-filtered query returns empty, falls back to latest posts."} -->
<!-- wp:takt/dynamic-content-carousel {"heading":"Filtered with Fallback","description":"Shows filtered posts, or latest if no matches.","postsType":"post","postsSource":"automatic","postsLimit":6,"fallbackToLatest":true} /-->
<!-- /wp:takt/demo-container -->

<!-- wp:takt/demo-container {"title":"Automatic with Fallback Disabled","description":"Automatic mode with fallbackToLatest disabled. If taxonomy-filtered query returns empty, shows nothing (respects hideIfEmpty)."} -->
<!-- wp:takt/dynamic-content-carousel {"heading":"Strict Filtering","description":"Only shows posts matching the filters.","postsType":"post","postsSource":"automatic","postsLimit":6,"fallbackToLatest":false,"hideIfEmpty":true} /-->
<!-- /wp:takt/demo-container -->

<!-- wp:takt/demo-container {"title":"Related Posts (Automatic Taxonomy Matching)","description":"Related mode: Shows posts that share taxonomy terms with the currently viewed post. Falls back to latest posts if no related posts exist."} -->
<!-- wp:takt/dynamic-content-carousel {"heading":"Related Content","description":"Discover more content related to what you're reading.","postsType":"post","postsSource":"related","postsLimit":6,"fallbackToLatest":true} /-->
<!-- /wp:takt/demo-container -->

<!-- wp:takt/demo-container {"title":"Related Resources","description":"Related mode with resource post type. Tests related query across multiple taxonomies (audience + resource_type)."} -->
<!-- wp:takt/dynamic-content-carousel {"eyebrow":"Related","heading":"More Resources For You","postsType":"resource","postsSource":"related","postsLimit":6,"fallbackToLatest":true} /-->
<!-- /wp:takt/demo-container -->

<!-- wp:takt/demo-container {"title":"Related with Fallback Disabled","description":"Related mode without fallback to latest. If no related posts exist, respects hideIfEmpty behavior."} -->
<!-- wp:takt/dynamic-content-carousel {"heading":"Strictly Related","description":"Only shows content when related posts are found.","postsType":"post","postsSource":"related","postsLimit":6,"hideIfEmpty":true,"fallbackToLatest":false} /-->
<!-- /wp:takt/demo-container -->

<!-- wp:takt/demo-container {"title":"Team Members (Automatic)","description":"Team member post type with automatic selection. Tests team-member card template rendering."} -->
<!-- wp:takt/dynamic-content-carousel {"eyebrow":"Our Team","heading":"Meet the Team","description":"Get to know the people behind our organization.","postsType":"team_member","postsSource":"automatic","postsLimit":9} /-->
<!-- /wp:takt/demo-container -->

<!-- wp:takt/demo-container {"title":"Resources (Automatic)","description":"Resource post type with automatic selection. Tests resource card template rendering."} -->
<!-- wp:takt/dynamic-content-carousel {"eyebrow":"Resources","heading":"Browse Resources","description":"Find the resources you need.","postsType":"resource","postsSource":"automatic","postsLimit":9} /-->
<!-- /wp:takt/demo-container -->

<!-- wp:takt/demo-container {"title":"Policies (Automatic)","description":"Policy post type with automatic selection. Tests policy card template rendering."} -->
<!-- wp:takt/dynamic-content-carousel {"eyebrow":"Governance","heading":"Our Policies","postsType":"policy","postsSource":"automatic","postsLimit":9} /-->
<!-- /wp:takt/demo-container -->

<!-- wp:takt/demo-container {"title":"Manual Selection","description":"Hand-picked posts using manual selection mode with empty selectedPosts array. Tests empty manual mode rendering (heading shows, no carousel)."} -->
<!-- wp:takt/dynamic-content-carousel {"heading":"Featured Posts","description":"Hand-picked content for this section.","postsType":"post","postsSource":"manual","selectedPosts":[]} /-->
<!-- /wp:takt/demo-container -->

<!-- wp:takt/demo-container {"title":"Empty Optional Fields","description":"No heading, eyebrow, description, or buttons. Tests shouldDisplay() handling and aria-label fallback."} -->
<!-- wp:takt/dynamic-content-carousel {"postsType":"post","postsSource":"automatic","postsLimit":6} /-->
<!-- /wp:takt/demo-container -->

<!-- wp:takt/demo-container {"title":"Hide If Empty","description":"Tests conditional visibility with hideIfEmpty flag. Section appears because policy posts exist; would hide if zero results."} -->
<!-- wp:takt/dynamic-content-carousel {"heading":"Hidden When Empty","postsType":"policy","postsSource":"automatic","postsLimit":9,"hideIfEmpty":true} /-->
<!-- /wp:takt/demo-container -->

<!-- wp:takt/demo-container {"title":"Long Content Edge Case","description":"Edge case with very long eyebrow (50+ chars), heading (100+ chars), description (300+ chars), and long button text. Tests overflow and wrapping behavior."} -->
<!-- wp:takt/dynamic-content-carousel {"eyebrow":"This Is A Very Long Eyebrow Text That Should Test Wrapping Behavior","heading":"This Is An Extremely Long Heading That Tests How The Block Handles Very Long Content In The Heading Area","description":"Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Suspendisse varius enim in eros elementum tristique. Duis cursus, mi quis viverra ornare, eros dolor interdum nulla, ut commodo diam libero vitae erat. Aenean faucibus nibh et justo cursus id rutrum lorem imperdiet. Nunc ut sem vitae risus tristique posuere. Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit.","buttons":[{"title":"Tell Us What You'd Like to See About Our Programs and Initiatives","url":"#"}],"postsType":"post","postsSource":"automatic","postsLimit":12} /-->
<!-- /wp:takt/demo-container -->

<!-- wp:takt/demo-container {"title":"No Pagination / No Navigation","description":"Pagination and navigation both disabled. Tests that controls row is completely hidden."} -->
<!-- wp:takt/dynamic-content-carousel {"heading":"Minimal Carousel","postsType":"post","postsSource":"automatic","showPagination":false,"showNavigation":false} /-->
<!-- /wp:takt/demo-container -->

<!-- wp:takt/demo-container {"title":"Loop Mode","description":"Tests carousel with loop enabled for infinite scroll behavior and inert attribute handling with Swiper's duplicate slides."} -->
<!-- wp:takt/dynamic-content-carousel {"heading":"Continuous Blog Loop","description":"This carousel loops infinitely, creating a seamless scrolling experience.","postsType":"post","postsSource":"automatic","postsLimit":6,"showPagination":true,"showNavigation":true,"loopCarousel":true} /-->
<!-- /wp:takt/demo-container -->

<!-- wp:takt/demo-container {"title":"Loop + Autoplay","description":"Tests combined loop and autoplay behavior with rotation control button, aria-live management, and focus-based pause in infinite loop mode."} -->
<!-- wp:takt/dynamic-content-carousel {"heading":"Auto-Rotating Infinite Loop","description":"This carousel combines infinite looping with automatic rotation.","postsType":"post","postsSource":"automatic","postsLimit":6,"showPagination":true,"showNavigation":true,"loopCarousel":true,"autoplayCarousel":true,"autoplayDelay":5} /-->
<!-- /wp:takt/demo-container -->
